caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a computer screen with a dark background, featuring a complex network diagram with various interconnected nodes. These nodes seem to represent different concepts or stages in a process, such as "start where," "learn modeling," and "developing models." A smaller inset image shows a circular flowchart with arrows connecting different elements, suggesting a cyclical or iterative process. The overall theme seems to revolve around understanding and applying systems thinking in a structured manner, possibly for educational or professional development purposes.
